title: ProgramChangeMap
description: Typed view of the Program Change map.

entries.description: The 384 mapped patches, in (bank-MSB, program) row-major order. Entry `i` is reached by Bank Select MSB `i / 128`, Program Change `i % 128`.

PatchLetter.description: Which of a bank's three patches a [`PatchRef`] points at.

PatchRef.description:
A reference to a stored patch — bank `1..=99` and slot A/B/C — as used by the Setup "current patch" field and every Program-Change-map entry.

Wire encoding: a single index `0..=296` (`0 = 01A`, `1 = 01B`, `2 = 01C`, `3 = 02A`, … `296 = 99C`), nibble-packed across 3 bytes. YAML: `{ bank: 12, slot: b }`.
